parameters.functionCode:
import sys, subprocess, os, json

# Expected payload:
# { "account_id": "demo_001", "transcript_path": "data/demo/demo_001.txt" }
payload = $json
account_id = payload["account_id"]
transcript_path = payload["transcript_path"]

# Run extraction script
result = subprocess.run(["scripts/extract_memo.py", transcript_path, account_id], capture_output=True, text=True)
if result.returncode != 0:
    raise Exception(f"Extraction failed: {result.stderr}")
memo_json = result.stdout

# Save memo JSON to output folder
out_path = f"outputs/accounts/{account_id}/v1/memo.json"
os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(out_path), exist_ok=True)
with open(out_path, "w") as f:
    f.write(memo_json)

# Render agent spec (v1)
subprocess.run(["scripts/render_agent_spec.py", out_path, "v1", f"outputs/accounts/{account_id}/v1/agent_spec.yaml"], check=True)

# (Optional) create Asana task – use a tiny HTTP request node later

return {
  "json": {
    "status": "ok",
    "account_id": account_id,
    "memo_path": out_path,
    "spec_path": f"outputs/accounts/{account_id}/v1/agent_spec.yaml"
  }
}

nodes.name: Asana Task (optional)
nodes.notes: If you want a task per account, fill in your Asana PAT and workspace/project IDs.
